heading: Submission of reports to Congress in electronic form
label: 118 Submission of reports to Congress in electronic form

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Whenever the Secretary or any other official of the Department is required by law to submit to Congress (or any committee of either chamber of Congress) a report, the Secretary or other official shall submit to Congress (or such committee) a copy of the report in an electronic format.

children.heading: .—Treatment
children.label: b .—Treatment
children.text: The submission of a copy of a report in accordance with this section shall be treated as meeting any requirement of law to submit such report to Congress (or any committee of either chamber of Congress).

children.heading: .—Report Defined
children.label: c .—Report Defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “report” includes any certification, notification, or other communication in writing.
